name: Dragonfly (Alibaba)
description: P2P-based image and file distribution system for cloud-native by Alibaba; CNCF Incubating.

seo.title: Dragonfly (Alibaba) — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Dragonfly (Alibaba): P2P-based image and file distribution system for cloud-native by Alibaba; CNCF Incubating.

when_to_use: P2P image distribution to thousands of Kubernetes nodes
Replacing container registry bottlenecks with P2P pull sharing
Large file distribution across clusters without origin overload
Accelerating Docker image pulls in CI/CD at scale
CNCF-compliant P2P content distribution for cloud-native teams

pros: P2P distribution cuts registry bandwidth dramatically
CNCF Incubating project with active community
Works with Kubernetes and container runtimes
cons: Complex to operate at production scale
Steep learning curve for P2P networking
review.verdict: Valuable for large-scale image distribution in Kubernetes, unnecessary pain for clusters under hundreds of nodes.
review.best_for: Large Kubernetes fleets suffering registry bandwidth bottlenecks at scale
review.not_for: Small teams that can use registry mirrors or Harbor instead
